news.headline: Vanessa Yakobson, CEO of Blo Blow Dry Bar, awarded 'CEO of the Year' by NewSpring Private Equity Group.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 19, 2024, Blo Blow Dry Bar, the top blow dry bar franchise in North America, concluded the year on a positive note by receiving prestigious recognition. The CEO of Blo Blow Dry Bar, Vanessa Yakobson, was awarded the esteemed 'CEO of the Year' title by a private equity group. This accolade comes at the end of a successful year for the franchise in 2024.

news.headline: Bybit x Block Scholes report: BTC hits all-time high, derivatives show caution. Futures concentrated on Dec contracts.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on December 19, 2024, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange, partnered with Block Scholes to unveil its latest crypto derivatives analytics report. The report delves into the current status of the crypto market, scrutinizing macro events and trading signals in spot and derivatives markets such as futures, options, and perpetual contracts.Highlighted Discoveries:Bitcoin (BTC) Achieves an All-Time Peak, Derivatives Markets Display Cautious EnthusiasmDespite BTC hitting an all-time high in spot price, the derivatives market conveys a more cautious stance compared to previous peak levels in the quarter. This indicates a potential adjustment in leverage following de-levering activity last week, resulting in stabilized funding rates, slower futures yield progression, and diminished interest in call options. Notably, futures exposure primarily revolves around BTC contracts expiring at the end of December, with marginal growth noted during the recent spot price surge.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: There's a lot of noise in recent data.
Calque sees exponential growth in 2024, adding equity-based home lending products, cements position in housing market.
news.summary: Calque has established itself as a significant player in the "Buy Before You Sell" sector in Austin, Texas, due to its competitive pricing and commitment to customer service. This company has garnered attention for its affordability and quality service, setting itself apart in the market.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: We're back in more normal labor market conditions.
BoE Gov. Bailey: Market rate pricing for February is in reasonable place.
BoE Gov. Bailey: We should not overinterpret the latest wage data.
Immunovia CEO Jeff Borcherding is pleased with achievements in 2024, looking forward to 2025 opportunities.
news.summary: In December 19, 2024, in Lund, Sweden, Immunovia expressed enthusiasm for their achievements in the year, highlighting the progress made and looking forward to future opportunities in 2025. Throughout 2024, the company successfully reached several important milestones, positioning Immunovia for success in the upcoming year.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: There's no group think on the MPC.
BoE Gov. Bailey: I can't say when or how much rates will fall.

Indiana University Student Health Center partners with eClinicalWorks and Sunoh.ai to use AI-powered technology to streamline clinical documentation, reducing administrative burden and enhancing patient care.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, the leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Indiana University Student Health Center has implemented Sunoh.ai, an AI-driven ambient listening tool integrated with eClinicalWorks. This partnership has allowed the health center to improve clinical documentation procedures. Through this collaboration, administrative tasks have been notably reduced, allowing healthcare providers to dedicate more time to providing better patient care. The efficient management of patient interactions is crucial for the student health center.

news.headline: Crisp attains ISO/IEC 27001 & ISO/IEC 27017 certification for data security. Leader in supply chain analytics.
news.summary: BENTONVILLE, Arkansas - Leading supply chain data and retail analytics company, Crisp, has recently obtained certifications for ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and ISO/IEC 27017:2015. These certifications, issued by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC), highlight Crisp's dedication to top-tier data security and privacy practices. ISO/IEC 27001:2022 focuses on establishing, implementing, operating, monitoring, reviewing, and maintaining an information security management system.ISO/IEC 27017:2015, on the other hand, specifically addresses information security aspects of cloud services. The achievement of these certifications underscores Crisp's commitment to maintaining robust security standards in its operations.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: There's a lot of uncertainty in the world.
BoE Gov. Bailey: The path of rates is downwards.
FDA announces end of Lilly weight-loss drug shortage in US. No more shortages reported.
Putin expresses willingness to meet Trump 'anytime'. Live updates on Bloomberg.
CPSC announces recalls of Magnetic Building Sticks Sets due to ingestion hazard, violating federal regulations. View at cpsc.gov now.
news.summary: Washington, December 19, 2024 - The Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has reported several recalls in partnership with various companies. The recalls relate to Magnetic Building Sticks Sets, which have been identified as posing a risk of ingestion. These products are in violation of federal toy safety regulations. For more information on the recalls, visit www.cpsc.gov.

news.headline: CPSC warns to stop using Sport Nets 4x8 Portable Soccer Goals due to impalement hazard, one reported death.
news.summary: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning on Dec. 19, 2024, urging consumers to cease using Sport Nets 4x8 portable soccer goals to prevent potential harm. The evaluation conducted by CPSC revealed a safety concern involving the exposed metal tip on the product, posing a significant risk of severe injury or fatality. It is crucial for consumers to heed this warning and discontinue the use of Sport Nets 4x8 to ensure safety.

news.headline: K2 Space to launch $60M mission with U.S. Space Force for Mega Class satellite in Feb 2026. #spaceforce #megaclass #missiongravitas
news.summary: A pioneering multi-orbit platform is set to be launched in February 2026 from Torrance, California. K2 Space has secured a significant contract with the U.S. Space Force for the inaugural deployment of its Mega Class satellite as part of the "Gravitas" mission. The contract holds a substantial worth of $60 million, marking a pivotal development in the space industry.

news.headline: Blanchard® releases 6th HR/L&D Trends Report offering insights for thriving in 2025 after 45 years in leadership.
news.summary: New details on how to succeed in 2025 have been provided by Blanchard®, a renowned company in leadership development, consulting, and coaching for over four decades. They have recently unveiled their Sixth Annual HR/L&D Trends Survey Report in San Diego on December 19, 2024. The report sheds light on the obstacles and opportunities that organizations are likely to face in the coming year.

news.headline: Community Financial System (NYSE: CBU) to hold conference call discussing Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Dec. 31.
news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled by Community Financial System, Inc. (NYSE: CBU) located in Syracuse, N.Y., on December 19, 2024, to review their financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to join this call to gain insight into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: US Senator Warren on X: I agree with Trump that congress should end the debt limit.
Chainlink's price drops by 8.53% in 24 hours to $24.59. Downward trend continues with a decrease of 13.0% over the past week from $28.4.
news.summary: The value of Chainlink's cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: LINK) has dropped by 8.53% in the last 24 hours to $24.59, maintaining a downward trajectory seen over the past week with a decline of 13.0% from $28.40. A comparison chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Chainlink over the past day, juxtaposed with its performance over the previous week. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stablecoins offer fast, low-cost settlements, facing regulatory challenges. Speakers at Benzinga conference discuss widespread adoption. Adoption on steady rise, aims to reshape global settlement system, increase efficiency. Integration into financial systems increasing.
news.summary: Stablecoins are gaining traction as efficient tools in the financial realm, promising faster settlements and cost savings. However, challenges persist in terms of regulations, infrastructure, and institutional buy-in. At the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference, experts discussed the potential of stablecoins to revolutionize payment systems by eliminating settlement delays. Colin Butler of Polygon Labs emphasized the effectiveness of stablecoins in generating returns during settlement periods, improving upon traditional methods. He pointed to BlackRock's move to tokenize its money market fund across multiple blockchains as evidence of increasing institutional interest in stablecoins. Expectations are high for wider integration of tokenized solutions in the financial sector.

news.headline: South Korea's culture showcased worldwide through K-beauty, K-pop, cuisine. Immersive experiences await in 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago, South Korea's dynamic culture is gaining worldwide attention, driven by the increasing popularity of K-beauty, K-pop, Korean food, and various other cultural influences that are shaping Western trends. The country's skincare products are setting benchmarks in the industry, while its entertainment industry is breaking records globally. Moreover, South Korea offers top-tier culinary experiences, with some restaurants even earning coveted Michelin stars. As we anticipate the year 2025, South Korea remains a premier destination for individuals seeking to engage with a diverse and flourishing cultural scene.

news.headline: Westwood Financial completes Camelback Village transformation adding new tenants like Derma Health; LaLa Land Kind Cafe to open in 2025. Camelback Village now fully leased.
news.summary: An established retail real estate investment company, Westwood Financial, operating for over 50 years and situated in Los Angeles, disclosed today the inauguration of Derma Health at Camelback Village in Phoenix's Paradise Valley district. Furthermore, LaLa Land Kind Cafe has finalized a lease agreement at the location and is set to commence operations by 2025. This development has brought Camelback Village to full capacity with a 100% lease rate. Following the comprehensive renovation initiative launched in 2021, involving a significant multi-million dollar investment, the site's occupancy has reached its peak.

news.headline: CPSC warns against FLIKRFIRE Tabletop Fireplaces due to flame jetting, fires. 2 deaths, burn injuries reported.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission issued a warning about the dangers of using alcohol-fueled FLIKRFIRE Tabletop Fireplaces. The commission highlighted the risk of uncontrollable pool fires that can occur when flames spread across pooled or spilled alcohol. This warning is crucial to prevent potential harm to consumers and ensure their safety. It is important for individuals to be cautious when using these fireplaces to avoid any incidents. Take note of this advisory to prevent any accidents or injuries related to the usage of alcohol-fueled FLIKRFIRE Tabletop Fireplaces.

news.headline: Boston Institute of Biotechnology and BiBo Pharma expanding to boost global biologics production capacity, revolutionizing industry.
news.summary: In Boston on December 19, 2024, the Boston Institute of Biotechnology, LLC (BIB) and sister company BiBo Pharma, leading Contract Development and Manufacturing Organizations (CDMOs) focusing on large-molecule biologics, revealed a significant investment.

news.headline: Russia's Defence Ministry: Russia downed all ATACMS and three out of four storm shadows.
US Foods' Make It Program donated $14.5M in 2024 including 7M pounds of food, 6M meals and 260 truckloads of products.
news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp, a major foodservice distributor in the US, revealed that they and their employees gave almost $14.5 million in cash, products, and volunteer hours in 2024. The aid was directed towards assisting hunger relief, culinary education, and disaster relief. This significant contribution encompassed about 7 million pounds of food and supplies, equivalent to over 6 million meals or more than 260 truckloads of resources.

news.headline: Russian Defence Ministry: Russia will respond to the attacks.
Excelsior Energy Capital in Minn has agreed with LG Energy Solution Vertech for a 7.5 GWh deal to supply BESS for US business.
news.summary: Excelsior Energy Capital, based in Excelsior, Minnesota, has recently completed a multiyear agreement with LG Energy Solution Vertech for 7.5 gigawatt-hours (GWh).

news.headline: Tractor Supply Company named one of Computerworld's Best Places to Work in IT; recognizes top organizations supporting IT staff.
news.summary: Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the US, has been honored as a Computerworld 2025 Best Place to Work in IT. This accolade acknowledges organizations that push their IT teams, provide attractive benefits, and encourage the use of cutting-edge technology. The selection is centered on the IT workplace's quality and excellence. Tractor Supply Company stands out for its dedication to its team.

news.headline: Curiosity Inc. expands into Free Ad-Supported Streaming TV on Fubo, DirecTV, Xumo, Sky UK, STARZ ON, and Fawsome TV.
news.summary: Silver Spring, Maryland - Curiosity Inc., a prominent global factual media and entertainment firm listed on Nasdaq as CURI, shared updates about its ongoing robust expansion into Free Ad-Supported Streaming Television (FAST). They have launched channels on platforms including Fubo, DirecTV, Xumo, Sky UK, STARZ ON, and Fawsome TV. This move by Curiosity demonstrates the increasing interest in high-quality ad-supported factual content, providing the company with avenues to broaden its digital presence.

news.headline: UKG is hosting a free, virtual HR and Payroll eSymposium on January 15 to provide data-driven strategies for workplace adaptation and agility.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Weston, Florida, UKG will be hosting a free virtual HR and Payroll event. The event aims to assist organizations in adapting to the changing work landscape by providing valuable data for workforce intelligence. This data is crucial for making real-time decisions, boosting productivity, and attracting and retaining a motivated workforce. In today's rapidly changing world of work, organizations must quickly implement strategies to support their teams and ensure business success. Trusted data is key to creating great workplaces and fostering an engaged workforce.

news.headline: Interactive Brokers improves global web-based trading for financial advisors, introduces upgrades to Advisor Portal. (Characters: 109)
news.summary: Interactive Brokers, based in Greenwich, Connecticut, and listed on Nasdaq as IBKR, has announced major upgrades to its Advisor Portal on the web.

news.headline: ISN gets ICSS Gold Certification from CSIA for outstanding customer service, evaluated on 24 attributes.
news.summary: The renowned company ISN, specializing in contractor and supplier information management services, proudly revealed that it has been awarded the prestigious International Customer Service Standard (ICSS) Gold Certification by the Customer Service Institute of America (CSIA). This recent accolade marks the second time ISN has secured the Gold Certification, with their initial achievement dating back to 2021. The evaluation process, which encompassed 24 key criteria essential for exceptional customer service, involved a thorough assessment of ISN’s operations, including an on-site inspection at their corporate headquarters in Dallas.

news.headline: Arisa Health, top non-profit in Arkansas, partners with Netsmart for CareFabric® platform to improve efficiencies and services.
news.summary: Netsmart, a leading provider of technology solutions, has revealed that Arisa Health, the biggest non-profit behavioral health provider in Arkansas, has chosen the CareFabric® platform. This decision aims to boost clinical, financial, and operational efficiencies within the organization's top-notch services and treatment initiatives. By teaming up with Netsmart, Arisa Health will receive cutting-edge technology to simplify processes and facilitate the provision of comprehensive, integrated care for individuals.

news.headline: Outamation adds 3 new members to its Board of Directors in Dallas, focused on innovation and excellence.
news.summary: In Dallas, Outamation has recently announced the appointment of new visionary executives to its Board of Directors. These executives are dedicated to driving innovation and excellence within the company.

news.headline: Hope Biosciences Research Foundation in Texas is starting Phase II clinical trial with FDA authorization for stem cell therapy in juvenile idiopathic arthritis patients aged 2-16, the first in this condition with this cell type.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, the Hope Biosciences Research Foundation (HBRF) has obtained FDA approval to provide Hope Biosciences’ adipose-derived mesenchymal (adult) stem cells (HB-adMSCs) to pediatric patients aged 2–16 with juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA). This marks the first FDA authorization for this cell type in treating JIA and is HBRF’s inaugural pediatric clinical trial. JIA, previously termed "Juvenile Rheumatoid Arthritis," affects young individuals and this authorization signifies a significant advancement in pediatric treatment for the condition.

news.headline: First National Realty Partners receives AMO® accreditation for excellence in real estate management. Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: A reputable national private equity commercial real estate firm, First National Realty Partners (FNRP), based in Red Bank, N.J., was acknowledged for their outstanding real estate management practices on December 19, 2024. They received the esteemed Accredited Management Organization (AMO®) recognition. This award solidifies FNRP's position as a top player in the industry.

news.headline: Russia's Defence Ministry: Ukraine hit Russia's Rostov region with six US-made ATACMS and four British storm shadow missiles on Wednesday.
LG Energy Solution Vertech partners with Excelsior Energy Capital to deliver 7.5 GWh energy storage projects in the US.
news.summary: LG Energy Solution Vertech recently disclosed a significant agreement with Excelsior Energy Capital, where they are set to develop 7.5 gigawatt hours (GWhs) of integrated energy storage projects. The products resulting from this partnership are guaranteed to comply with U.S. domestic content requirements. The agreement, signed in Westborough, Massachusetts on December 19, 2024, outlines a multi-year collaboration between the two companies.

news.headline: $11M invested in PeproMene Bio's PMB-CT01 for Follicular Lymphoma treatment; $6M upfront, $5M conditional from Institute.
news.summary: After obtaining encouraging results in the initial stages of the PMB-102 Phase 1 trial, PeproMene Bio is set to gain an initial payment of $6 million USD alongside a potential $5 million USD in incremental funding from the Institute for Follicular Lymphoma Innovation. The research focuses on individuals experiencing relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma, showcasing promising outcomes.

news.headline: SquareX appoints David Smith as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) to drive growth. Smith brings tech and cybersecurity expertise.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California on December 19, 2024, SquareX, a top browser security firm, made public the selection of David Smith as their Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). David, a respected figure in the technology and cybersecurity industries, joins with extensive experience in these fields.

news.headline: BAE Systems to supply actuator control units for JetZero's sustainable jet demonstrator, enhancing performance.
news.summary: Cutting-edge actuation electronics are set to provide dependable, top-quality control for upcoming aircraft models in ENDICOTT, N.Y., as of December 19, 2024. BAE Systems, listed on the London Stock Exchange as BA, is slated to supply and merge actuator control units (ACUs) for the next-generation blended wing body aircraft of JetZero.

news.headline: Victors Home Solutions and Habitat for Humanity team up to give Detroit veteran a worry-free winter with 18 new window replacements.
news.summary: Victors Home Solutions has joined hands with Habitat for Humanity to offer James Jenkins, a local Detroit resident and veteran, 18 new window replacements. The initiative follows the successful provision of a new roof to Jenkins by Victors Home Solutions on Veterans Day in 2023. Jenkins had also sought assistance for other home renovations.

news.headline: dōTERRA teams up with Save the Children & Cobie Smulders to distribute 59,175 wellness kits in underserved U.S. communities.
news.summary: dōTERRA, a leading provider of essential oils and wellness products, has collaborated with various entities to distribute 59,175 wellness kits to aid children and families affected by Hurricane Helene. The kits will be delivered to social service centers, schools, and community pantries in an effort to provide relief and support to those impacted by the disaster. This initiative is part of dōTERRA's ongoing commitment to assist communities in times of need.

news.headline: Ingo Kästner will take over management at X-CAGO from 1 January 2024, in Berlin and Roermond, Netherlands.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 19, 2024, in Berlin and Roermond, Netherlands, Ingo Kästner, the Managing Director of PMG Presse-Monitor, will be assuming the management responsibilities at X-CAGO starting from January 1. This transition is significant as X-CAGO is well-known as a top global expert in data and content conversion within the international market. This change in leadership marks a strategic move aimed at leveraging Kästner's expertise in the field to further enhance X-CAGO's position in the industry, bringing together two leading entities under a common management structure.

news.headline: SignOff Semiconductors to open new office in Penang, Malaysia. Expansion plans announced on Dec 19, 2024. Headquarters in Bengaluru, India.
news.summary: In December 19, 2024, SignOff Semiconductors Pvt. Ltd., a Bengaluru-based company, known for its VLSI and Embedded Design services, has opened a new office in Penang, Malaysia. This move marks a significant expansion for the company, further strengthening its presence internationally.
